steps.title: Reinforce the aviation claim
steps.content: The first sentence says some ticker-tape parades honored aviation achievements. The next sentence confirms and emphasizes that claim by saying Whitmore's parade was one of 16 honoring pilots.

steps.title: Choose confirmation, not contrast
steps.content: Choice A would add a separate point, Choice C would contrast, and Choice D would state a result. The remaining transition reinforces the previous claim. The answer is B.
